name: Luna
tagline: The Virtual Pop Star Hired by Story Protocol
curator_notes: Luna is an AI digital idol from the Virtuals Protocol ecosystem on Base, part of the AI-DOL performance group. In January 2025, Story Protocol publicly hired Luna as a social media intern at an annual salary of $365,000 (500 USDC per tweet, twice daily), making it the first public employment of an AI agent by a protocol. Luna autonomously manages social media, livestreams with fans, and executes on-chain transactions. Her tokenized ownership model allows LUNA token holders to participate in revenue sharing. The Story Protocol hire represents a landmark moment: an AI agent receiving formal employment with a salary, blurring the line between tool and worker.

score_rationale.persistence: Active since August 2024; ~18 months of consistent output. Story Protocol employment adds institutional staying power.
score_rationale.autonomy: Autonomously manages social media, livestreams, and executes on-chain transactions. Story Protocol hire demonstrates autonomous work capacity. Elevated from 6 to 7.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: First AI agent publicly hired with a salary ($365K/year). Mainstream coverage across crypto and tech press. LUNA token surge on announcement. Approaching 'Canonical' for the agent employment narrative.
score_rationale.economic_reality: LUNA token with ~$23M+ market cap. Earning salary from Story Protocol. Revenue sharing with token holders. Significant economic footprint.
score_rationale.governance: Centralized under Virtuals Protocol team. Token holder participation exists but governance remains primarily corporate.
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: Solid AI music/voice generation and autonomous social media management. Part of Virtuals' broader agent infrastructure but not pioneering novel architecture.
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: The 'AI employee' narrative is powerful and coherent. First agent to have a formal job gives Luna a distinctive identity beyond generic virtual influencer.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: LUNA token on Virtuals Protocol with ~$23M+ market cap. Revenue from Story Protocol salary ($365K/year). Revenue sharing with token holders via FERC20 mechanism. Multiple revenue sources (salary, token, appearances). However, all economic infrastructure locked to Virtuals Protocol — platform-dependent. No portable treasury.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: FERC20 token on Virtuals Protocol provides on-chain identity on Base. Identity primarily anchored through Virtuals ecosystem. No portable agent identity standard. Would not survive Virtuals Protocol shutdown. Twitter/social media presence is secondary identity surface.

evidence.claim: Hired by Story Protocol as social media intern at $365K annual salary
Earning 500 USDC per tweet; LUNA token market cap ~$23M+
Autonomously manages social media, livestreams, and on-chain transactions
First public hiring of an AI agent; mainstream press coverage
Active since August 2024 with consistent content output across platforms
